title: Chef Craft Easy to Read Plastic, Measuring Cup Set, 10 piece set, Blue
description:
About this item
Includes 1/8 tsp, 1/4 tsp, 1/2 tsp, 1 tsp, 1/2 tbsp, 1 tbsp, 1/4 cup, 1/3 cup, 1/2 cup and 1 cup sizes
Made of durable, BPA free, plastic that is built to last for many years
Double molded for increased durability and function so the measurements do not come off
Lightweight construction also has easy to read, large print measurements
Dishwasher safe
10-Piece Set
Double molded for increased durability and function
Show more
reviews_5s: I was looking for an easy way to read measuring cups as most of them are made with writing so small and the same color as the cup itself. Not these!! They are perfect. The print is large and on the inside! Genius!! I bought a second set just because they are so easy to identify. Would recommend this product to anyone and everyone. They are really that great!I'm getting up there in age and it's hard to read measuring cups...this item is awesome and I can't figure out why no one has come up with this item earlier. Convenient, strong and easy on the eyes. Recommend!I bought this for my wife. She had mentioned that she wanted some new ones. I found these and got them in the green color. She loves them and how the sizes are clearly marked. Great price and delivered when promised.Quality made. Sturdy handle. Dishwasher safe. Cup size easy to identify.I really enjoyed receiving these cups in the mail. They make easy to see the size with the large printing inside the cups. I also like the color. They have been great for measuring out my ingredients. Would highly recommend them.Great product, arrived as described.Good quality and great for someone who has sight impairments as measurements are easy to seeThis is what you need if your vision is compromised. The marking is large, legible and will not wear off. I highly recommend these measuring cupsMy Sweetheart loves these, they make it far easier to see if you've got the measure needed for the correct amount; especially for far sighted folks. The old style with small raised numbers are very hard to read.Couldn't believe it when I got it
reviews_1s: Came used with food still in itThe 1 cup is actually 6 ounces. Screwed up a LOT of recipes before figuring that out. This whole set went into the trash.Very cheap and flimsy. Will not use these.These are so cheaply made it’s unbelievable, the plastic is thin and easily breakable, the feel and look is nothing like the picture…just cheap that’s all I can sayNot good for any thing to small.I was ordering this for my Mom who has a hard time seeing. I thought it would work great with the big numbers. With the blue and white would be easy for her to see. It came an was just a plain white measuring cups. 🙁Disappointed that the measuring cups don’t have a 2/3 of a cup or three-quarter cup measurements. The only one I have found that has these is Tupperware very expensive but worth it to get a complete set.We received two half cups and no 3/4 cupThe cups I got don’t have the large clear markings on them, that’s the sole reason for ordering these. Got them for my vision impaired mom and they are no help at allDollar store quality plastic. Thin and bendy. These are going back.
